Bug Title: High Response Time for Products API
Bug Description: Products API endpoint takes more than 10 seconds to respond
Steps to Reproduce:
1. Send GET request to /products?page=1&limit=10
2. Measure response time
3. Observe slow performance
Expected Behavior: Response time should be under 5 seconds

Bug Description: API accepts page=0 without proper validation
Steps to Reproduce:
1. Send GET request to /products?page=0&limit=10
2. Observe response
Expected Behavior: Should return 400 Bad Request for invalid page

Bug Description: API accepts limit=0 without proper validation
Steps to Reproduce:
1. Send GET request to /products?page=1&limit=0
2. Observe response
Expected Behavior: Should return 400 Bad Request for invalid limit

Bug Title: Missing Error Handling for Invalid Product ID
Bug Description: API doesn't handle invalid product IDs properly
Steps to Reproduce:
1. Send GET request to /products/99999
2. Observe response
Expected Behavior: Should return 404 Not Found for non-existent product

Bug Description: Search API doesn't handle special characters properly
Steps to Reproduce:
1. Send GET request to /products?search=test@123
2. Observe response
Actual Behavior: May cause errors or unexpected behavior

Steps to Reproduce:
1. Send multiple rapid requests to /products
2. Observe response
Expected Behavior: Should implement rate limiting to prevent abuse

Steps to Reproduce:
